series_metadata.series_title: Internal Disability Management Files of BWC Employees.
series_metadata.series_description: The Internal Disability Management Files are claims filed by BWC employees who will be off work utilizing their Disability Leave Benefits. The records describe their medical condition/procedure, any forms and/or communication with DAS regarding the claim, and any related payroll records. The Internal Disability Management Files of BWC Employees are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Digitally image the Internal Disability Management Files. The scanned versions of the Internal Disability Management Files are to be verified for quality assurance. Retain 120 days after they have been imaged, and then destroy. ; Electronic: The machine readable information will be reviewed every 3 years to ensure that the files can still be accessed. Retain the electronic files 7 years after employee separation from the BWC, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
